texto: I heard a bump and knew it must have been Nathan throwing the door up in anger. “And so what if she is here you asshole? I told you the other day that you are NOT welcome here anymore..!” He roared.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Line F. Nielsen que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “I heard a bump and knew it must have been Nathan throwing the door up in anger. “And so what if s…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, romance-novels, heard, com foco em reflexao.
